SELECT 1
2026-06-20 13:38:45.502 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (83ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']

IF EXISTS
    (SELECT *
     FROM [sys].[objects] o
     WHERE [o].[type] = 'U'
     AND [o].[is_ms_shipped] = 0
     AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT *
         FROM [sys].[extended_properties] AS [ep]
         WHERE [ep].[major_id] = [o].[object_id]
             AND [ep].[minor_id] = 0
             AND [ep].[class] = 1
             AND [ep].[name] = N'microsoft_database_tools_support'
    )

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [e].[Id], [e].[DepartmentId], [e].[Email], [e].[FirstName], [e].[HireDate], [e].[IsActive], [e].[LastName], [e].[Phone], [e].[Salary], [d].[Id] AS [Id0], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[Description], [d].[Name]

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'

    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM [Departments] AS [d]
2026-06-20 19:42:38.575 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (27ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT CASE [t].[Status]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'
    ELSE CAST([t].[Status] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], COUNT(*) AS [Count]

    SELECT TOP(1) [e].[Id], [e].[DepartmentId], [e].[Email], [e].[FirstName], [e].[HireDate], [e].[IsActive], [e].[LastName], [e].[Phone], [e].[Salary], [d].[Id] AS [Id0], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[Description], [d].[Name]
